Code.title: Code
Code.description:
Alphanumerical text identifier with upper-case letters and limits on using
special characters or whitespace to separate blocks.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of corrective invoice to produce.

issue_date.title: Issue Date
issue_date.description: When the new corrective invoice's issue date should be set to.

series.title: Series
series.description: Series to assign to the new corrective invoice.

stamps.title: Stamps
stamps.description: Stamps of the previous document to include in the preceding data.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Human readable reason for the corrective operation.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description:
Extensions for region specific requirements that may be added in the preceding
or at the document level, according to the local rules.

copy_tax.title: Copy Tax Totals
copy_tax.description:
CopyTax when true will copy the tax totals from the previous document to the
preceding document data.

CorrectionOptions.description: CorrectionOptions defines a structure used to pass configuration options to correct a previous invoice.

Date.title: Date
Date.description: Civil date in simplified ISO format, like 2021-05-26

Extensions.description: Extensions is a map of extension keys to values.

Key.title: Key
Key.description: Text identifier to be used instead of a code for a more verbose but readable identifier.

prv.title: Provider
prv.description: Identity of the agency used to create the stamp usually defined by each region.

val.title: Value
val.description: The serialized stamp value generated for or by the external agency

Stamp.description: Stamp defines an official seal of approval from a third party like a governmental agency or intermediary and should thus be included in any official envelopes.
